steps: Go to https://app.close.com and log in to your Close account
Enter a descriptive name for the key (e.g., 'My Integration')
Copy the key immediately — it will not be shown again
notes: The API key is shown only once at creation time — store it securely
Close uses HTTP Basic authentication: pass the API key as the username with an empty password
API keys have full read and write access to all CRM data
Close offers a free trial; paid plans are required for full CRM access
Rate limits apply: 60 requests per minute on standard plans

test_endpoint.description: Get the authenticated user's profile to verify credentials
